# Shreyansh Sawarn

> DevOps Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience designing, automating, and
> operating production-grade CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure on
> Microsoft Azure. Currently at Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), May 2021 to
> present. Open to DevOps & SRE opportunities.

## Expertise

- Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipeline design (Kong Gateway, frontend/backend platforms)
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Terragrunt (DRY multi-environment Azure IaaS)
- Containers: Docker, Kubernetes (AKS)
- SRE: Azure Application Insights, reliability engineering — reduced unplanned
  downtime ~50%, improved SLI from 97.2% to 98.55%
- Security: vulnerability remediation (Qualys, CrowdStrike, Nucleus), CVE
  analysis, SonarCloud, JFrog Artifactory/Xray
- Languages/tools: Python, PowerShell, YAML, KQL, MySQL, Linux

## Notable work

- End-to-end Azure DevOps CI/CD for Kong Gateway using decK and RBAC-secured
  Admin APIs
- Automated Redis Enterprise operations: mTLS-secured RedisJSON configuration
  loading, sequential version-aware upgrade framework
- [tf-azure](https://github.com/shreyansh-sawarn/tf-azure): reusable Terraform
  modules for Azure infrastructure automation
